## Checklist

- [ ] I exported JSON from the level editor.
- [ ] The exported JSON is under `levels/drafts/` or `levels/accepted/`.
- [ ] I ran `node scripts/validate-levels.mjs`.
- [ ] Every route exit has a valid `toLevelId`.
- [ ] Every route exit has a valid `toEntranceId`.
- [ ] Spawn and entrance positions were tested.
- [ ] Extraction exits are only used for run-ending exits.
- [ ] Known issues are listed below.
